service_line_config.name: sap
service_line_config.tech_context: This project is built on SAP platform. Key technologies and concepts: - Core Modules: SAP S/4HANA, ECC, MM, SD, FI/CO, PP, HCM, BW - UI: SAP Fiori, SAPUI5, SAP Business Application Studio - Backend: ABAP, CDS Views, OData services, BAPIs, RFCs, IDocs - Integration: SAP Integration Suite (CPI), SAP PI/PO, RFC, IDocs, OData, BAPI - Data: SAP HANA, BW/4HANA, SAP Analytics Cloud, ALV reports - Workflow: SAP Business Workflow, SAP Build Process Automation - Security: SAP roles, authorization objects, SoD (Segregation of Duties), GRC - DevOps: SAP Transport Management, ChaRM, SAP BTP CI/CD - Environments: Development, Quality, Pre-Production, Production (landscape) - Extensions: SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform), side-by-side extensions, in-app extensions

artifact_overrides.module_extraction: Map modules to SAP functional areas: financials (FI/CO), sales and distribution (SD), materials management (MM), production planning (PP), human capital management (HCM), analytics/reporting. Focus on custom development and configuration, not standard SAP setup.
artifact_overrides.functional_req: - Specify whether a requirement uses standard SAP configuration, custom ABAP development, or Fiori app extension - Reference SAP transaction codes, tables, and objects when relevant - For integration requirements, specify IDoc, BAPI, RFC, or OData approach - Note SAP authorization object requirements for security-sensitive features
artifact_overrides.nonfunctional_req: - HANA database performance and memory consumption targets - Transport request management and landscape consistency - Authorization and SoD compliance requirements - Report execution time for BW queries and CDS views - Integration throughput for IDoc and batch processing scenarios - System availability across the SAP landscape
artifact_overrides.task: - SAP configuration: IMG activities, customizing tables, master data setup - ABAP development: reports, enhancements, BADIs, user exits, CDS views - Fiori/SAPUI5 development: custom apps, extensions, tiles, launchpad config - Integration development: IDoc configuration, BAPI wrappers, OData services - Data migration: LSMW, LTMC, data load programs, legacy mapping - Testing: unit test classes, transport to QA, integration test execution - Transport management: request creation, release, import sequence
artifact_overrides.test_case: - Test with multiple SAP roles to verify authorization object checks - Test across the full SAP landscape (Dev → QA → Pre-Prod) - Test IDoc and integration scenarios with error handling and reprocessing - Test data migration with production-scale volumes - Verify transport import sequence doesn't break dependent objects - Test Fiori apps on multiple devices and browsers
artifact_overrides.architecture: - SAP system landscape: Dev/QA/Pre-Prod/Prod topology - Module architecture: which SAP modules are in scope and their interdependencies - Extension approach: in-app (classic ABAP) vs side-by-side (SAP BTP) - Integration architecture: CPI/PI flows, IDoc channels, OData services, RFC destinations - Fiori architecture: app types (transactional, analytical, factsheet), launchpad configuration - Data architecture: HANA models, CDS views, BW extractors - Transport strategy: request types, release workflow, import queue management
artifact_overrides.risk_entry: - Transport conflicts and import sequence dependencies - Authorization and SoD compliance gaps - HANA memory and performance issues with custom CDS views - Integration failures due to IDoc/RFC configuration mismatches across landscape - SAP upgrade and support pack compatibility with custom ABAP code - Data migration quality and volume constraints - Fiori compatibility across SAP versions and browsers
